name: Tax Organizer
description_en: Organize and process US personal and consultant tax documents—W-2, 1099s, K-1s, 1098—into accurate reports and drafts, handling rental properties, royalties, partnerships/S-corps, business expenses, per-diem optimization, and charitable receipts.
description_zh: 整理并处理美国个人与顾问类报税文件——W-2、1099、K-1、1098——生成准确的报表与草稿,涵盖出租物业、版税、合伙/S-corp、业务开支、差旅 per-diem 优化与慈善凭据。
long_en: Matches expenses to income sources and drafts schedules (e.g., Schedule E) from messy document sets, reducing the manual sorting before a return is finalized.
long_zh: 从杂乱的文件集中把开支与收入来源对应起来并起草附表(如 Schedule E),减少定稿前的人工整理。
sec_note_en: Processes highly sensitive tax documents locally and produces drafts only—not professional tax advice; have a CPA review before filing.
sec_note_zh: 在本地处理高度敏感的报税文件,仅生成草稿而非专业税务意见;申报前请由注册会计师复核。
